hooks.command: sh -c 'if command -v pwsh >/dev/null 2>&1; then exec pwsh -NoProfile -File "$1"; else exec bash "$2"; fi' _ "{{HOME}}/.claude/hooks/main-push-guard.ps1" "{{HOME}}/.claude/hooks/main-push-guard.sh"
sh -c 'if command -v pwsh >/dev/null 2>&1; then exec pwsh -NoProfile -File "$1"; else exec bash "$2"; fi' _ "{{HOME}}/.claude/hooks/secret-guard.ps1" "{{HOME}}/.claude/hooks/secret-guard.sh"

sh -c 'if command -v pwsh >/dev/null 2>&1; then exec pwsh -NoProfile -File "$1"; else exec bash "$2"; fi' _ "{{HOME}}/.claude/hooks/destructive-guard.ps1" "{{HOME}}/.claude/hooks/destructive-guard.sh"
